events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the lock-without-tag (or tag-without-lock) condition violates OSHA 1910.147(c)(5)'s requirement that lockout and tagout devices be applied together, breaking the isolation-before-verification sequence. Decision is `fail`, risk `high` — work must stop until the missing lock or tag is applied and zero-energy state is re-verified before continuing.
